infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow ParrotKit to access your camera so you can shoot with recipe cues.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow ParrotKit to record your voice while shooting recipe takes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow ParrotKit to save approved recipe takes to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow ParrotKit to access saved recipe takes in your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ParrotKit to access your camera so you can shoot with recipe cues.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow ParrotKit to record your voice while shooting recipe takes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ParrotKit to access saved recipe takes in your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow ParrotKit to save approved recipe takes to your photo library.
